principle: legacy-app is a temporary runtime bridge; visible public UI must be template-first

extractedSeams.notes: Only low-risk URL/hash/permalink/reply-handle helpers moved. Comments sheet orchestration and Blogger behavior remain in legacy-app.

Only saved data normalization, storage parsing/writing, lookup, and list toggle calculation moved. Saved listing rendering, exclusive mode handling, native row hiding, toolbar label sync, and event orchestration remain in legacy-app.

Only Popular range normalization/href/label and Related normalization/pagination/dot state helpers moved. Popular rendering, Blogger widget parsing, Related rendering, and template hydration remain in legacy-app.
Only low-risk network/fallback state helpers and fallback status payload helpers moved. Search-empty, 404, listing growth, timers, rendering, and fetch orchestration remain in legacy-app.

noGrowthPolicy.reason: legacy-app should shrink or stay stable while behavior moves into purpose-specific modules

extractionBuckets.name: Boot/runtime wiring
extractionBuckets.nextTaskRecommendation: Extract only stable boot sequencing and GG namespace exports after panel and route APIs are mapped.

extractionBuckets.name: Template cloning / DOM hydration glue
extractionBuckets.nextTaskRecommendation: Keep helper small; future tasks may move repeated text/icon/attribute hydration only after call sites are stable.

extractionBuckets.name: Comments sheet / replies
extractionBuckets.nextTaskRecommendation: Keep URL/hash helper seam stable; extract comments sheet controller only after native Blogger reply behavior has targeted smoke coverage.

extractionBuckets.name: Saved listing / saved state
extractionBuckets.nextTaskRecommendation: Keep saved listing rendering, exclusive mode handling, native row hiding, toolbar label sync, and save/unsave event lifecycle in legacy-app until a focused listing module extraction has smoke coverage.

extractionBuckets.name: Popular controls
extractionBuckets.nextTaskRecommendation: Keep Popular rendering and Blogger widget parsing in legacy-app until a focused listing module extraction has smoke coverage.

extractionBuckets.name: Related posts / prev-next / dots
extractionBuckets.nextTaskRecommendation: Keep Related rendering and template hydration in legacy-app until detail context parsing and smoke coverage are narrower.

extractionBuckets.name: Offline/error/fallback behavior
extractionBuckets.nextTaskRecommendation: Keep search-empty, 404, listing growth, timers, rendering, and fetch orchestration in legacy-app until feedback flow smoke coverage is narrower.

extractionBuckets.name: Parsing/extraction helpers
extractionBuckets.nextTaskRecommendation: Extract pure text, date, label, feed, and Blogger HTML parsing helpers after tests cover current fallback behavior.

extractionBuckets.name: Store and landing cross-surface references
extractionBuckets.nextTaskRecommendation: Move route vocabulary and cross-surface navigation contracts after Console-owned target config is stable.
